content:
📜 Rules for the Jury System
✔ Students must present arguments for each choice before voting.
✔ If the vote is deadlocked, students must engage in a final challenge to break the tie.
✔ Some students may attempt to “bribe” the jury with XP trades or sacrifices.

✅ Why This Works:
• Forces every student to engage in a meaningful choice.
• Encourages literary analysis through real-time ethical debates.
• Ties the class structure to narrative decision-making.

📜 4. The XP Leader’s Final Reward – What Do They Get?

📜 Since legend status alone isn’t enough, what is the practical benefit of being the XP leader?

✔ Final Decision: The XP Leader Becomes “The Last Scholar”
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 269 (chunk 269/555)
